stage: human_verification (UAT) — execution complete, awaiting Docker-dependent checks

blockers.description: Docker Desktop NOT installed (no docker in Windows PATH or WSL Ubuntu)
blockers.workaround: Install Docker Desktop, start it, then run the 3 UAT checks

blockers.description: PostgreSQL 17 native listens on 5432, conflicting with docker-compose Postgres (mapped 5432:5432)
blockers.workaround: Remap docker PG to 5433:5432 + update DATABASE_URL/DIRECT_URL/.env.example, OR stop the native PG service before docker compose up

human_actions_pending.context: Required for SC1 (Redis), SC3 live migrate, and OPS-02 image build — Docker is foundational to this project

human_actions_pending.action: Decide port-5432 conflict handling (remap docker PG to 5433, or stop native PG)
human_actions_pending.context: docker compose up will fail to bind 5432 while native PG17 holds it

decisions.decision: Fix CRLF via .gitattributes (* text=auto eol=lf) rather than changing autocrlf or biome lineEnding
decisions.rationale: Cross-platform robust; working tree always LF so Biome passes on Windows; CI (Linux) already green

decisions.decision: Do NOT approve Phase 1 until SC1/SC3-live/OPS-02 pass under Docker
decisions.rationale: Approving would claim success on unrun live checks

decisions.decision: Research + planning + plan-check done inline by Opus (not via sub-agents)
decisions.rationale: User declined sub-agent spawn; Opus has warm context and is the planning terminal

First resolve the 5432 port conflict. Then approve in the Sonnet terminal.
